efficiency_optimizer.label: Efficiency Optimizer
efficiency_optimizer.strategic_intent: Protect success rate with low-risk underneath and play-action answers after the defense declares structure.
expected_behavior: conservative offense risk on every call
quick_game plus play_action_flood >= 20 calls across seed pack
no vertical_shot calls across seed pack

aggressive_shot_taker.label: Aggressive Shot-Taker
aggressive_shot_taker.strategic_intent: Push high-risk pass answers into passive coverage shells before pressure counters arrive.
expected_behavior: aggressive offense risk >= 80% of calls
quick_game plus play_action_flood >= 20 calls across seed pack
touchdowns on every baseline seed
aggressive_shot_taker.notes: Name retained from the plan; the live graph exposes shot tolerance, but the winning aggregate signature is aggressive quick and play-action passing rather than frequent vertical_shot calls.

misdirection_artist.label: Misdirection Artist
misdirection_artist.strategic_intent: Use quick throws, RPO space, and low-threshold screens to punish pressure and late-disguise looks.
expected_behavior: rpo_glance calls >= 8 across seed pack
screen calls >= 3 across seed pack
offense spacing burn >= 40 across seed pack

run_game_builder.label: Run-Game Builder
run_game_builder.strategic_intent: Build first-down run credibility, then convert defensive fit reactions into conservative play-action answers.
expected_behavior: inside_zone calls >= 7 across seed pack
play_action_flood calls >= 7 across seed pack
conservative offense risk on every call

coverage_shell_conservative.label: Coverage Shell Conservative
coverage_shell_conservative.strategic_intent: Stay low-risk, close explosive windows, and force the offense to settle for underneath space.
expected_behavior: conservative defense risk on every call
redzone_bracket plus bear_front >= 30 calls across seed pack
underneath_space_taken events >= 15 across seed pack

pressure_look_defender.label: Pressure-Look Defender
pressure_look_defender.strategic_intent: Mix simulated and true pressure on long downs while accepting higher-risk calls.
expected_behavior: zero_pressure plus simulated_pressure >= 15 calls across seed pack
aggressive defense risk >= 15 calls across seed pack
defense rush burn >= 45 across seed pack

disguise_specialist.label: Disguise Specialist
disguise_specialist.strategic_intent: Lean into late simulated pressure and coverage movement without escalating into true zero pressure.
expected_behavior: simulated_pressure calls >= 13 across seed pack
defense disguise burn >= 50 across seed pack
zero_pressure calls == 0 across seed pack

man_coverage_bully.label: Man-Coverage Bully
man_coverage_bully.strategic_intent: Challenge long downs with assertive man calls while still fitting run and bracket reactions.
expected_behavior: cover1_man calls >= 6 across seed pack
aggressive defense risk >= 6 calls across seed pack
redzone_bracket plus bear_front >= 26 calls across seed pack
